rulings.Case Title: NICOLE WOOLDRIDGE VS. ARTHUR STEVEN BROWN, ALSO KNOWN AS STEVE BROWN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Nicole Wooldridge'S Notice Of Motion And Motion Top Compel Defendant To Produce Party Affiliated Witness Alana Parker For Deposition And Production Of Documents And Award For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 21, 2013, line 1. Plaintiff Nicole Wooldridge's Motion Top Compel Defendant To Produce Party Affiliated Witness Alana Parker For Deposition And Production Of Documents And Award For Monetary Sanctions Continued December 16, 2013 to per stipulation of the parties. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRUCE WALLACE et al VS. TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 21, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT ANGELO SANGIACOMO AS TRUSTEE OF THE SANGIACOMO and YVONNE SANGIACOMO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Continued to November 1, 2013. Opposing party is ordered to resubmits its "Points in Authorities in Opposition to Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment or adjudication," formatted in compliance with CRC 2.108. No other changes shall be made. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RYAN BENTHAM VS. AVIGNON O'FARRELL, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complt
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 21, 2013, line 6. PLAINTIFF RYAN BENTHAM's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint DENIED, Plaintiff failed to establish that the identity of DOE defendants were not know to him before the action was filed, or that they did not become known to him long before the motion was filed, e.g. employment relationship, UD action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RYAN BENTHAM VS. AVIGNON O'FARRELL, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 21, 2013, line 6. PLAINTIFF RYAN BENTHAM's Motion To Disqualify Attorney Whitworth DENIED. No confidential information has been shared with Whitworth outside the presence of Ms. Tse. No information material to the current representation was provided to Mr. Whitworth. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: UNION BANK N.A. VS. JAPAN CENTER WEST ASSOCIATES L.P. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Compel Arb; Petition; Submission Of Federal Authority
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 21, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF UNION BANK N.A.'s Petition To Compel Arbitration GRANTED. Plaintiff has shown the existence of an Arbitration provision in 1978 Agreement, breach of which is alleged in the Cross-Complaint. Cross-Complain admits that plaintiff and defendant are parties to 1978 Agreement. Defendant failed to show that Plaintiff waived its right to arbitrate with a party to the 1978 Agreement. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. RAY K. SHAHANI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 21, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT RAY SHAHANI's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH FINAL LEAVE TO AMEND to explain in good faith discrepancies between allegations in Complaint 2, 6 and FAC/SAC 2, 6. Specifically to explain why Wells Fargo asserted ownership of the premises based on March 4, 2013 foreclosure sale in Complaint and Bank of America asserted ownership of the same property based on the same March 4, 2013 foreclosure sale. Opposing party fails to cite any authority or provide any argument for the proposition that power of attorney grants ownership rights, i.e. 13 of SAC fails to explain the discrepancy described above. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIANE CRESCI VS. VORAVAN CHUNGCHANSART et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel The Attendance At Depo
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 21, 2013, line 5. PLAINTIFF DIANE CRESCI's Motion To Compel The Attendance At Deposition OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/REQ)
